3124580.name: of the Devil - Episode 1
3124580.description:
ALWAYS BET ON RED.

Unlock the first of five episodic murder mysteries with the Episode 1 DLC for "of the Devil" and dive headfirst into the dark and thrilling corporate conspiracy that unfolds when the father of modern android programming is found dead of apparent suicide.

HEDGE ALL YOUR BETS.

Meet brand new characters, explore all-new environments and tackle never-before-seen gameplay as you play mental blackjack to extract witness's testimony or call "BS" when someone tries to sneak a lie past you in the courtroom.

For a real gambler's high, turn on "Highroller Mode" to limit your ability to save and tackle this mystery with a true devil-may-care attitude.

THE DEVIL MADE 'EM DO IT.

Morgan will need to investigate the crime scene, interrogate witnesses, harass the police with snarky text messages and go all-in to uncover the truth...while keeping her own secrets as far out of the public eye as she can manage.
